name: ADR validator rejects a status value outside the MADR allowed enum proposed accepted deprecated superseded
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1\nstatus: made-up\n' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check status 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_status=made-up' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=proposed|accepted|deprecated|superseded' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
